title: Code Grader
description: A platform for grading and optimising user code submissions using Large Language Models. Built to handle concurrent evaluations with feedback on complexity, style, and correctness.

title: Vimero
description: A microservices video-sharing platform engineered for horizontal scalability. Handles transcoding, CDN distribution, and real-time analytics.

title: Analytics API
description: An admin panel dashboard for analytics of user activity and engagement. Built with high-performance aggregation pipelines.

title: Snappio Backend
description: Backend for a social media and chat application. Real-time messaging via WebSockets with PostgreSQL persistence.

title: Computer Shop
description: A full-stack e-commerce web application with cart, checkout, and order management. Optimized for performance and SEO.
